text: Expansion of US strikes on Iran leads to more retaliation across the Gulf - AP News

text: Best of Nordstrom’s Anniversary Sale: Beauty Exclusives, Bombas Socks, More - TODAY.com
fullText: Nordstrom’s Anniversary Sale opened to the public this weekend! Shop fashion and beauty brands like Clinique, Bombas and more during the annual savings event.

text: Cartel boss Ismael "El Mayo" Zambada gets life in U.S. prison 2 years after he says he was kidnapped, flown to Texas - CBS News
fullText: Ismael "El Mayo" Zambada ordered torture and plotted murders as he Joaquín "El Chapo" Guzmán grew the Sinaloa cartel into the world's largest drug trafficking organization, prosecutors said.

text: Iran War Updates: 3 U.S. troops killed, dozens wounded as repeat attacks on base in Jordan raise questions - CBS News
fullText: At least 3 U.S. service members were killed over the weekend in Iraq and Jordan, where back-to-back Iranian attacks on a U.S. base seem to have evaded defenses.

text: Spain’s World Cup champions return home for royal welcome and parade through Madrid - AP News
fullText: Spain's World Cup-winning players have returned to the country. The 26-man squad were greeted by the Spanish royal palace and Prime Minister Pedro Sánchez ahead of a parade through central Madrid. Hundreds of thousands of fans are expected to greet them as th…

text: Four competing priorities bog down Republicans ahead of midterms - The Washington Post
fullText: GOP leaders want to fund the Iran war, aid farmers and enact voting restrictions before Nov. 3. But internal divisions are again getting in the way.

text: Judge Pauses Paramount-Warner Bros. Merger - Variety
fullText: A federal judge granted a temporary restraining order pausing the Paramount-Warner Bros. Discovery merger.

text: NC farmers see increased produce sales as cyclosporiasis outbreak continues - WRAL
fullText: Shoppers are turning to locally grown produce sold at the State Farmer’s Market as health officials investigate the cyclosporiasis outbreak in North Carolina to find a source.

text: NYC smoke bomb: Man in custody after fire set outside 26 Federal Plaza immigration building in Lower Manhattan - ABC7 New York
fullText: Video showed the suspect pouring gasoline outside the building and then setting it on fire, according to the Department of Homeland Security.

text: FDA retracts test result but still links Taylor Farms lettuce to cyclosporiasis - The Washington Post
fullText: The FDA did not back away from its conclusion that the company remains linked to a multistate outbreak of cyclosporiasis through its investigation.

text: India's Gen Z 'Cockroach People's Party' started as satire but is serious about change - NPR
fullText: They call themselves the "cockroaches" and they're on the march — demanding action against corruption, amid a shortage of opportunities for young people in India.

text: Troy Jackson appears closest to securing Maine Democrats' nomination - WMTW
fullText: The majority of Troy Jackson's preferred delegates have been selected at county meetings, positioning him to win the party's nomination next weekend.

text: Trial begins for Massachusetts mom who says postpartum issues led her to kill 3 children - AP News
fullText: Jury selection has begun in the murder trial of a Massachusetts woman who is expected to argue that postpartum issues were the reason she killed her three children. Lindsay Clancy has pleaded not guilty in the three counts of murder in the deaths of her child…

text: Stock futures are higher to start the week as U.S. oil reverses gains, chipmakers rise: Live updates - CNBC
fullText: Stocks rose Monday as oil prices fluctuated in response to the latest bout of military exchanges between the U.S. and Iran.

text: ‘Avengers: Doomsday’ Trailer Reveals First Look at Robert Downey Jr.’s Doctor Doom - The Hollywood Reporter
fullText: Ahead of the superhero feature hitting theaters later this year, Disney helped to iron out some details about the sequel with the new footage released online.

text: Nolan Wells’ funeral to be held Monday in Mississippi - NBC News
fullText: OCEAN SPRINGS, Miss. — Hundreds gathered Monday to mourn Nolan Wells, the Mississippi teenager whose death after a Fourth of July boating trip with friends has fueled national attention and growing demands for answers.

text: Hackers are exploiting recently patched WordPress bugs, putting millions of websites at risk - TechCrunch
fullText: Two critical security flaws in WordPress’ software have given hackers the chance to remotely take over tens of millions of websites, according to an estimate by a cybersecurity researcher.

text: ‘King of the North’ Andy Burnham becomes 7th British prime minister in a decade - NBC News
fullText: The new Labour Party leader Andy Burnham is set to replace Keir Starmer as British prime minister, inheriting a country beset by low wages and internal strife.

text: Ebola death toll in DRC surges to at least 930 as outbreak gathers pace - Al Jazeera
fullText: Ebola spreading faster than any previous outbreak in DRC, with 37 new deaths recorded over just 24 hours at the weekend.

text: Dozens feared dead after passenger ferry carrying over 100 people sinks off coast of Guyana - CNN
fullText: Guyana’s government said Monday that 10 bodies have been recovered from a ferry that capsized off the coast over the weekend with 133 people on board.
